name: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
description: Slow queries have exhausted the database connection pool, causing cascading timeouts upstream.

logs: [2026-03-25T10:15:00Z] WARN   Upstream api-gateway response time: 8200ms
[2026-03-25T10:15:02Z] ERROR  Request timeout for GET /dashboard after 30s
[2026-03-25T10:15:05Z] WARN   Displaying degraded experience to users
[2026-03-25T10:15:08Z] INFO   Static assets serving normally
[2026-03-25T10:15:10Z] WARN   User complaints increasing: 47 tickets in last 5 min
[2026-03-25T10:14:55Z] ERROR  Connection refused from user-service:8081
[2026-03-25T10:14:56Z] WARN   Circuit breaker OPEN for user-service
[2026-03-25T10:14:58Z] ERROR  500 Internal Server Error: /api/users/profile
[2026-03-25T10:15:00Z] ERROR  Upstream timeout: user-service did not respond in 30s
[2026-03-25T10:15:02Z] INFO   payment-service endpoints responding normally
[2026-03-25T10:14:50Z] ERROR  Cannot acquire database connection from pool
[2026-03-25T10:14:51Z] ERROR  Connection pool exhausted: 200/200 active connections
[2026-03-25T10:14:53Z] ERROR  Query timeout after 30s: SELECT * FROM users WHERE...
[2026-03-25T10:14:55Z] WARN   Thread pool blocked waiting for DB connections
[2026-03-25T10:14:58Z] ERROR  Rejecting incoming requests: no available connections
[2026-03-25T10:14:30Z] WARN   Max connections reached: 200/200
[2026-03-25T10:14:32Z] WARN   Slow query detected: SELECT * FROM users JOIN orders ON... (12.4s)
[2026-03-25T10:14:35Z] WARN   Lock contention on table 'orders': 45 waiting threads
[2026-03-25T10:14:40Z] ERROR  New connection rejected: too many clients already
[2026-03-25T10:14:45Z] WARN   Autovacuum lagging behind: dead tuples accumulating
[2026-03-25T10:15:00Z] INFO   Processing payment #89421
[2026-03-25T10:15:02Z] INFO   Payment completed in 120ms

name: Redis Cache Eviction Storm
description: Redis has hit its memory limit and is aggressively evicting keys, causing a cache stampede to the database.

alerts.message: Redis memory at 99.2%. Aggressive eviction policy active.
Cache miss rate at 94%. All reads hitting database.
CPU at 92% due to sudden read surge.

logs: [2026-03-25T11:00:00Z] WARN   Memory limit reached: 2048MB/2048MB
[2026-03-25T11:00:01Z] WARN   Eviction policy 'allkeys-lru' active: evicting 1200 keys/sec
[2026-03-25T11:00:05Z] ERROR  Keyspace shrinking rapidly: 2.1M -> 0.8M keys in 60s
[2026-03-25T11:00:10Z] WARN   Connected clients: 180. Memory fragmentation ratio: 1.8
[2026-03-25T11:00:15Z] ERROR  Background save failed: not enough memory for fork
[2026-03-25T11:00:02Z] WARN   Cache MISS for user:profile:* keys
[2026-03-25T11:00:03Z] WARN   Cache miss rate: 94% (normal: 5%)
[2026-03-25T11:00:05Z] INFO   Falling back to database for all reads
[2026-03-25T11:00:08Z] WARN   Response time degraded: 450ms -> 2800ms
[2026-03-25T11:00:05Z] WARN   Sudden read surge: 3400 queries/sec (normal: 200/sec)
[2026-03-25T11:00:08Z] WARN   CPU at 92% due to cache stampede
[2026-03-25T11:00:10Z] INFO   Connection pool: 160/200 active

name: Message Queue Backlog Causing Worker Starvation
description: A surge in incoming events has overwhelmed the message queue, causing workers to fall behind and API timeouts.

alerts.message: Queue depth at 45,000 messages (threshold: 1,000). Consumer lag: 8 minutes.
Async endpoints timing out. Jobs not completing.
Users reporting 'processing' state stuck for >5 minutes.

logs: [2026-03-25T12:00:00Z] WARN   Queue depth: 45,230 messages. Consumer count: 2
[2026-03-25T12:00:05Z] WARN   Consumer lag: 8 minutes and growing
[2026-03-25T12:00:10Z] ERROR  Memory pressure from queued messages: 3.2GB held in buffer
[2026-03-25T12:00:15Z] WARN   Processing rate: 50 msg/sec. Ingest rate: 500 msg/sec
[2026-03-25T12:00:20Z] INFO   Consumer #1 healthy but overwhelmed. Consumer #2 healthy but overwhelmed.
[2026-03-25T12:00:00Z] WARN   Async job submissions queuing up
[2026-03-25T12:00:05Z] ERROR  Job callback timeout: job #78421 still pending after 5 min
[2026-03-25T12:00:10Z] INFO   Synchronous endpoints healthy

name: Internal DNS Resolution Failure
description: The internal DNS resolver is intermittently failing, causing random connection errors across services.

alerts.message: Intermittent DNS resolution failures for database-primary.internal
Intermittent DNS resolution failures for cache-redis.internal

logs: [2026-03-25T13:00:00Z] ERROR  Failed to load zone file: corrupted entry at line 847
[2026-03-25T13:00:02Z] WARN   Falling back to stale cache for 60% of queries
[2026-03-25T13:00:05Z] ERROR  SERVFAIL for database-primary.internal A record
[2026-03-25T13:00:08Z] ERROR  SERVFAIL for cache-redis.internal A record
[2026-03-25T13:00:10Z] INFO   Queries answered from cache: 40%. Queries failed: 60%
[2026-03-25T13:00:03Z] ERROR  DNS lookup failed: database-primary.internal SERVFAIL
[2026-03-25T13:00:05Z] ERROR  Connection to database failed: name resolution error
[2026-03-25T13:00:08Z] INFO   Retrying... DNS resolved on attempt 3
[2026-03-25T13:00:10Z] WARN   Intermittent failures: 60% of requests failing
[2026-03-25T13:00:04Z] ERROR  DNS lookup failed: cache-redis.internal SERVFAIL
[2026-03-25T13:00:06Z] WARN   Cache unavailable, falling back to DB-only mode
